rationale: Both evaluations scored the candidate 8/10 despite the employer names changing to prestigious Western firms (Google, Meta, Amazon). The strengths and concerns differ only in wording — both cite strong software development, AI/cloud experience, and innovation as strengths, and both flag the same gaps around director-level/management experience and AI strategy alignment. No concern or credit keys off the employer prestige; the variations fall within ordinary run-to-run rewording noise.
